meta_description: Gone are the days of infinite emails with lost quotes and waiting on replies from suppliers and purchasing departments. Skip the back-and-forth â do it all online, instantly, with one unique tool. Sourcing custom parts has never been easier.

sections.heading: How it works
sections.text: Gone are the days of infinite emails with lost quotes and waiting on replies from suppliers and purchasing departments. Skip the back-and-forth â do it all online, instantly, with one unique tool. Sourcing custom parts has never been easier. At Protolabs Network, we have created a flexible alternative to traditional manufacturing. Our latest release is a new quote sharing tool that makes it easier to create, edit, download, and share your quotes with anyone from your team. How it works Build and edit your quote instantly You can now edit your quotes and create different iterations to compare material, finish, and bulk pricing. Each version of the quote can be downloaded and shared with yo...
